mapper.select:
SELECT c.id AS id, c.contract_type As contractType, c.business_type AS businessType, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.contract_attr AS contractAttr, c.products_name AS productsName, c.file_id AS fileId, c.invoice_file_id AS invoiceFileId, c.amount_file_id AS amountFileId, c.warehouse_file_id AS warehouseFileId, c.double_check_file_id AS doubleCheckFileId, c.our_company_name AS ourCompanyName, c.company_name AS companyName, c.delivery_mode AS deliveryMode, c.total_number AS totalNumber, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.pay_bond_time AS payBondTime, c.pay_full_time AS payFullTIme, c.dealed_amount AS dealedAmount, a.real_pay_date AS lastPayDate, c.delivery_date_to AS deliveryDateTo, c.warehouse_number AS warehouseNumber, a.real_warehose_date AS lastDeliveryDate, c.billed_amount AS billedAmount, a.real_bill_date AS lastBillDate, c.contract_status AS contractStatus, c.contract_time AS contractTime, DATEDIFF(IFNULL(c.contract_end_time, Now()),c.contract_time) AS contractDifTime, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.enterprise_id AS enterprise_id, IF(INSTR(c.products_name,',')>0,'1','0') As moreProduct, IF(t.id IS NOT NULL, '1','0') AS exitContractText, ROUND(IF((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)=c.total_amount,(c.total_number-c.warehouse_number),((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount-c.bond_amount)/(c.total_amount/c.total_number)-c.warehouse_number)),3) AS expectDeliveryInNum, IF(IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_apply_delivery_in i WHERE i.contract_id = c.id AND i.`status` = 'C'),0) > 0,true,false) As existDeliveryCancel FROM t_ctr_contract c LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_apply a ON c.id = a.ctr_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_text t ON c.id = t.ctr_contract_id WHERE c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.contract_type = 'B' AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) >= c.bond_amount AND IF((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)=c.total_amount,(c.total_number-c.warehouse_number),((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount-c.bond_amount)/(c.total_amount/c.total_number)-c.warehouse_number)) > 0
ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT SUM(c.total_number) AS totalNumber, SUM(c.total_amount) AS totalAmount, SUM(c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) AS dealedAmount, SUM(c.warehouse_number) AS warehouseNumber, SUM(c.billed_amount) AS billedAmount, SUM(ROUND(IF((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)=c.total_amount,(c.total_number-c.warehouse_number),((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount-c.bond_amount)/(c.total_amount/c.total_number)-c.warehouse_number)),3)) AS expectDeliveryInNum FROM t_ctr_contract c WHERE c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.contract_type = 'B' AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) >= c.bond_amount AND IF((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)=c.total_amount,(c.total_number-c.warehouse_number),((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount-c.bond_amount)/(c.total_amount/c.total_number)-c.warehouse_number)) > 0

SELECT c.id AS id, c.contract_type As contractType, c.business_type AS businessType, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.contract_attr AS contractAttr, c.products_name AS productsName, c.file_id AS fileId, c.invoice_file_id AS invoiceFileId, c.amount_file_id AS amountFileId, c.warehouse_file_id AS warehouseFileId, c.double_check_file_id AS doubleCheckFileId, c.our_company_name AS ourCompanyName, c.company_name AS companyName, c.delivery_mode AS deliveryMode, c.total_number AS totalNumber, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.pay_bond_time AS payBondTime, c.pay_full_time AS payFullTIme, c.dealed_amount AS dealedAmount, a.real_pay_date AS lastPayDate, c.delivery_date_to AS deliveryDateTo, c.warehouse_number AS warehouseNumber, a.real_warehose_date AS lastDeliveryDate, c.billed_amount AS billedAmount, a.real_bill_date AS lastBillDate, c.contract_status AS contractStatus, c.contract_time AS contractTime, DATEDIFF(IFNULL(c.contract_end_time, Now()),c.contract_time) AS contractDifTime, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.enterprise_id AS enterprise_id, IF(INSTR(c.products_name,',')>0,'1','0') As moreProduct, IF(t.id IS NOT NULL, '1','0') AS exitContractText, ROUND(IF((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.bond_amount,c.warehouse_number,(c.warehouse_number-(c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount-c.bond_amount)/(c.total_amount/c.total_number))),3) AS expectDeliveryInNum FROM t_ctr_contract c LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_apply a ON c.id = a.ctr_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_text t ON c.id = t.ctr_contract_id WHERE c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.contract_type = 'B' AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) > 0 AND c.total_amount > (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) AND IF((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.bond_amount,c.warehouse_number,(c.warehouse_number-(c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount-c.bond_amount)/(c.total_amount/c.total_number))) > 0
ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT SUM(c.total_number) AS totalNumber, SUM(c.total_amount) AS totalAmount, SUM(c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) AS dealedAmount, SUM(c.warehouse_number) AS warehouseNumber, SUM(c.billed_amount) AS billedAmount, SUM(ROUND(IF((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.bond_amount,c.warehouse_number,(c.warehouse_number-(c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount-c.bond_amount)/(c.total_amount/c.total_number))),3)) AS expectDeliveryInNum FROM t_ctr_contract c WHERE c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.contract_type = 'B' AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) > 0 AND c.total_amount > (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) AND IF((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.bond_amount,c.warehouse_number,(c.warehouse_number-(c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount-c.bond_amount)/(c.total_amount/c.total_number))) > 0

SELECT c.id AS id, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.business_type AS businessType, c.our_company_name AS ourCompanyName, c.company_name AS companyName, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.contract_time AS contractTime, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.dept_id AS deptId FROM t_ctr_contract c WHERE c.source = 'L' AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.link_contract_id is NULL AND c.status = 'D'
ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT c.id AS id, c.business_type As businessType, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.our_company_name AS ourCompanyName, c.company_name AS companyName, r.receive_date As lastPayDate, r.payed_amount AS dealedAmount, r.receive_amount AS receiveAmount, r.unpayed_amount AS unDealedAmount, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.pay_full_time AS payFullTime FROM t_apply_receive r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON c.id = r.contract_id WHERE r.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND r.`status` = 'D' AND c.business_type in('SX-SX','SX-HK')
ORDER BY r.id DESC

SELECT c.id AS id, c.contract_type As contractType, c.business_type AS businessType, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.contract_attr AS contractAttr, c.products_name AS productsName, c.file_id AS fileId, c.invoice_file_id AS invoiceFileId, c.amount_file_id AS amountFileId, c.warehouse_file_id AS warehouseFileId, c.double_check_file_id AS doubleCheckFileId, c.our_company_name AS ourCompanyName, c.company_name AS companyName, c.delivery_mode AS deliveryMode, c.total_number AS totalNumber, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.pay_bond_time AS payBondTime, c.pay_full_time AS payFullTIme, c.dealed_amount AS dealedAmount, a.real_pay_date AS lastPayDate, c.delivery_date_to AS deliveryDateTo, c.warehouse_number AS warehouseNumber, a.real_warehose_date AS lastDeliveryDate, c.billed_amount AS billedAmount, a.real_bill_date AS lastBillDate, c.contract_status AS contractStatus, c.contract_time AS contractTime, DATEDIFF(IFNULL(c.contract_end_time, Now()),c.contract_time) AS contractDifTime, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.enterprise_id AS enterprise_id, IF(INSTR(c.products_name,',')>0,'1','0') As moreProduct, IF(t.id IS NOT NULL, '1','0') AS exitContractText, ROUND(((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount-c.bond_amount)/(c.total_amount/c.total_number)-c.warehouse_number),3) As expectDeliveryInNum FROM t_ctr_contract c LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_apply a ON c.id = a.ctr_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_text t ON c.id = t.ctr_contract_id WHERE c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.contract_type = 'S' AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) > c.bond_amount AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) < c.total_amount AND ROUND(((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount-c.bond_amount)/(c.total_amount/c.total_number)-c.warehouse_number),3) > 0
ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT SUM(c.total_number) AS totalNumber, SUM(c.total_amount) AS totalAmount, SUM(c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) AS dealedAmount, SUM(c.warehouse_number) AS warehouseNumber, SUM(c.billed_amount) AS billedAmount, SUM(ROUND(((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount-c.bond_amount)/(c.total_amount/c.total_number)-c.warehouse_number),3)) AS expectDeliveryInNum FROM t_ctr_contract c WHERE c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.contract_type = 'S' AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) > c.bond_amount AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) < c.total_amount AND ROUND(((c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount-c.bond_amount)/(c.total_amount/c.total_number)-c.warehouse_number),3) > 0

select * from t_rpt_base_cost rc where 1=1
and rc.base_date = #{baseDate}

SELECT sc.dept_id AS deptId, sc.match_user_id AS matchUserId, sc.match_user_name AS matchUserName, COUNT(1) AS orderCount, SUM(sc.total_amount) AS sellTotalAmount, SUM(bc.total_amount) AS buyTotalAmount, SUM(sc.total_amount - bc.total_amount - bc.warehouse_amount - bc.transport_amount - sc.warehouse_amount - sc.transport_amount - bc.delivery_fee - sc.delivery_fee - sc.stevedorage - bc.stevedorage) AS profit, ROUND( sum( (bc.transport_amount+sc.transport_amount)/1.09 + (bc.warehouse_amount+bc.delivery_fee+bc.stevedorage+sc.warehouse_amount+sc.delivery_fee+sc.stevedorage)/1.06 + ( (sc.total_amount-bc.total_amount)/1.13*0.13 - (bc.transport_amount+sc.transport_amount)/1.09*0.09 - (bc.warehouse_amount+bc.delivery_fee+bc.stevedorage+sc.warehouse_amount+sc.delivery_fee+sc.stevedorage)/1.06*0.06 - (sc.total_amount*(if(sc.insurance_rate is null,0,sc.insurance_rate)))/1.06 )*0.12 + (sc.total_amount*(if(sc.insurance_rate is null,0,sc.insurance_rate)))/1.06 ), 2 ) AS cost, ROUND( sum( (sc.total_amount-bc.total_amount)/1.13 - (bc.transport_amount+sc.transport_amount)/1.09 - (bc.warehouse_amount+bc.delivery_fee+bc.stevedorage+sc.warehouse_amount+sc.delivery_fee+sc.stevedorage)/1.06 - ( (sc.total_amount-bc.total_amount)/1.13*0.13 - (bc.transport_amount+sc.transport_amount)/1.09*0.09 - (bc.warehouse_amount+bc.delivery_fee+bc.stevedorage+sc.warehouse_amount+sc.delivery_fee+sc.stevedorage)/1.06*0.06 - (sc.total_amount*(if(sc.insurance_rate is null,0,sc.insurance_rate)))/1.06 )*0.12 - (sc.total_amount*(if(sc.insurance_rate is null,0,sc.insurance_rate)))/1.06 ), 2 ) AS margin, CASE WHEN #{noBusinessType} = 'Y' THEN '全部' WHEN sc.match_credit_flg = TRUE AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' THEN '赊销' WHEN sc.match_credit_flg = FALSE AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' THEN'代采' END AS businessName FROM t_ctr_contract_settlement r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract bc ON bc.id = r.buy_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract sc ON sc.id = r.sell_contract_id WHERE sc.seal_flg = TRUE AND sc.contract_status != 'C' AND sc.status != 'C' and bc.seal_flg = TRUE and sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND sc.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeStart}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeStart}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and sc.dept_id in
#{myDeptIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND sc.match_credit_flg = TRUE
AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND sc.match_credit_flg = FALSE
AND sc.business_type != 'ZY-BB'
AND sc.match_user_id = #{matchUserId}
GROUP BY sc.match_user_id,sc.dept_id,businessName,CONCAT(IFNULL(sc.match_user_id,''),IFNULL(sc.dept_id,''),IFNULL(businessName,''))
GROUP BY sc.dept_id,businessName
order by deptId asc,margin desc

SELECT sc.dept_id AS deptId, sc.match_user_id AS matchUserId, sc.match_user_name AS matchUserName, COUNT(1) AS orderCount, SUM(sc.total_amount) AS sellTotalAmount, SUM(bc.total_amount) AS buyTotalAmount, SUM(sc.total_amount - bc.total_amount - bc.warehouse_amount - bc.transport_amount - sc.warehouse_amount - sc.transport_amount - bc.delivery_fee - sc.delivery_fee - sc.stevedorage - bc.stevedorage) AS profit, ROUND( sum( (bc.transport_amount+sc.transport_amount)/1.09 + (bc.warehouse_amount+bc.delivery_fee+bc.stevedorage+sc.warehouse_amount+sc.delivery_fee+sc.stevedorage)/1.06 + ( (sc.total_amount-bc.total_amount)/1.13*0.13 - (bc.transport_amount+sc.transport_amount)/1.09*0.09 - (bc.warehouse_amount+bc.delivery_fee+bc.stevedorage+sc.warehouse_amount+sc.delivery_fee+sc.stevedorage)/1.06*0.06 - (sc.total_amount*(if(sc.insurance_rate is null,0,sc.insurance_rate)))/1.06 )*0.12 + (sc.total_amount*(if(sc.insurance_rate is null,0,sc.insurance_rate)))/1.06 ), 2 ) AS cost, ROUND(
sum( (sc.total_amount-bc.total_amount)/1.13 - (bc.transport_amount+sc.transport_amount)/1.09 - (bc.warehouse_amount+bc.delivery_fee+bc.stevedorage+sc.warehouse_amount+sc.delivery_fee+sc.stevedorage)/1.06 - ( (sc.total_amount-bc.total_amount)/1.13*0.13 - (bc.transport_amount+sc.transport_amount)/1.09*0.09 - (bc.warehouse_amount+bc.delivery_fee+bc.stevedorage+sc.warehouse_amount+sc.delivery_fee+sc.stevedorage)/1.06*0.06 - (sc.total_amount*(if(sc.insurance_rate is null,0,sc.insurance_rate)))/1.06 )*0.12 - (sc.total_amount*(if(sc.insurance_rate is null,0,sc.insurance_rate)))/1.06 ), 2 ) AS margin, CASE WHEN #{noBusinessType} = 'Y' THEN '全部' WHEN sc.match_credit_flg = TRUE AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' THEN '赊销' WHEN sc.match_credit_flg = FALSE AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' THEN'代采' END AS businessName FROM t_ctr_contract_settlement r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract bc ON bc.id = r.buy_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract sc ON sc.id = r.sell_contract_id WHERE sc.seal_flg = TRUE AND sc.contract_status != 'C' AND sc.status != 'C' and bc.seal_flg = TRUE and sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND sc.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeStart}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeStart}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and sc.dept_id in
#{myDeptIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND sc.match_credit_flg = TRUE
AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND sc.match_credit_flg = FALSE
AND sc.business_type != 'ZY-BB'
AND sc.match_user_id = #{matchUserId}
GROUP BY sc.match_user_id,sc.dept_id,businessName,CONCAT(IFNULL(sc.match_user_id,''),IFNULL(sc.dept_id,''),IFNULL(businessName,''))
GROUP BY sc.dept_id,businessName
order by profit desc

select sc.dept_id AS deptId, CASE WHEN #{noBusinessType} = 'Y' THEN '全部' WHEN sc.match_credit_flg = TRUE AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' THEN '赊销' WHEN sc.match_credit_flg = FALSE AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' THEN'代采' END AS businessName, ROUND(SUM(if(our.company_name is NULL, sc.total_amount - dcsx.total_amount, dcsx.total_amount-bc.total_amount) + IFNULL((sc.breach_amount*sc.breach_days*0.1)/365,0) - IFNULL(sc.receive_breach_amount,0))/1.13,6) dcsxCapitalCost FROM t_ctr_contract_settlement r INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract bc ON bc.id = r.buy_contract_id INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract sc ON sc.id = r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_dcsx dcsx ON dcsx.approve_id = bc.approve_id LEFT JOIN t_bs_company_our our ON dcsx.our_company_name = our.company_name AND our.our_company_flag=TRUE LEFT JOIN t_bs_company_our our2 ON dcsx.company_name = our2.company_name AND our2.our_company_flag=TRUE where sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and sc.match_credit_flg = TRUE and sc.business_type_dcsx IN ('DCSXBL', 'DCSX', 'DCSXHDFK') and sc.seal_flg = TRUE and bc.seal_flg = TRUE and sc.status != 'C' and bc.status != 'C'
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeStart}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeStart}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and sc.dept_id in
#{myDeptIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND sc.match_credit_flg = TRUE
AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND sc.match_credit_flg = FALSE
AND sc.business_type != 'ZY-BB'
AND sc.match_user_id = #{matchUserId}
GROUP BY sc.match_user_id,sc.dept_id,businessName,CONCAT(IFNULL(sc.match_user_id,''),IFNULL(sc.dept_id,''),IFNULL(businessName,''))
GROUP BY sc.dept_id,businessName

select sc.dept_id AS deptId, CASE WHEN #{noBusinessType} = 'Y' THEN '全部' WHEN sc.match_credit_flg = TRUE AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' THEN '赊销' WHEN sc.match_credit_flg = FALSE AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' THEN'代采' END AS businessName, ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(r.financial_service_amount,0))/1.13,6) capitalCost FROM t_ctr_contract_settlement r INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract bc ON bc.id = r.buy_contract_id INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract sc ON sc.id = r.sell_contract_id where sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and sc.match_credit_flg = TRUE and sc.business_type_dcsx not IN ('DCSXBL', 'DCSX', 'DCSXHDFK') and sc.seal_flg = TRUE and bc.seal_flg = TRUE and sc.status != 'C' and bc.status != 'C'
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeStart}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeStart}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and sc.dept_id in
#{myDeptIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND sc.match_credit_flg = TRUE
AND sc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND sc.match_credit_flg = FALSE
AND sc.business_type != 'ZY-BB'
AND sc.match_user_id = #{matchUserId}
GROUP BY sc.match_user_id,sc.dept_id,businessName,CONCAT(IFNULL(sc.match_user_id,''),IFNULL(sc.dept_id,''),IFNULL(businessName,''))
GROUP BY sc.dept_id,businessName

SELECT DISTINCT sc.dept_id AS deptId FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract bc ON bc.id = r.buy_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract sc ON sc.id = r.sell_contract_id WHERE sc.seal_flg = TRUE AND sc.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} GROUP BY sc.dept_id,CONCAT(IFNULL(sc.business_type,''),IFNULL(sc.business_type_dcsx,''))
SELECT config_value FROM t_bs_product_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} ORDER BY updated_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT match_user_id AS matchUserId, match_user_name AS matchUserName, buy_commission_rate AS buyCommissionRate, sell_commission_rate AS sellCommissionRate, marketing_rate AS marketingRate, company_rate AS companyRate, buy_head_commission_rate AS buyHeadCommissionRate, sell_head_commission_rate AS sellHeadCommissionRate FROM t_bs_match_profits_config GROUP BY match_user_id

SELECT c.id AS id, c.approve_id AS approveId, c.enterprise_id AS enterpriseId, c.contract_type AS contractType, c.business_no AS businessNo, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.contract_time AS contractTime, c.company_id AS companyId, c.company_name AS companyName, c.our_company_name AS ourCompanyName, c.delivery_type AS deliveryType, c.pay_type AS payType, c.total_number AS totalNumber, c.delivery_mode AS deliveryMode, c.delivery_addr AS deliveryAddr, c.product_status AS productStatus, c.contract_status AS contractStatus, c.remark AS remark, c.bond_rate AS bondRate, c.bond_amount AS bondAmount, c.`status` AS STATUS, c.pay_full_time AS payFullTime, c.appoint_pay_full_time AS appointPayFullTime, c.real_pay_full_time AS realPayFullTime, c.match_user_id AS matchUserId, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.delivery_date_from AS deliveryDateFrom, c.delivery_date_to AS deliveryDateTo, c.contact_name AS contactName, c.contact_addr AS contactAddr, c.bill_flg AS billFlg, c.fond_flg AS fondFlg, c.transport_amount AS transportAmount, c.warehouse_amount AS warehouseAmount, c.real_transport_amount AS realTransportAmount, c.real_warehouse_amount AS realWarehouseAmount, c.interest_amount AS interestAmount, c.receive_interest_amount AS receiveInterestAmount, c.breach_amount AS breachAmount, c.receive_breach_amount AS receiveBreachAmount, c.warehouse_flg AS warehouseFlg, c.billed_amount AS billedAmount, c.dealed_amount AS dealedAmount, c.warehouse_number AS warehouseNumber, c.stevedorage AS stevedorage, c.source AS source, c.link_contract_id AS linkContractId, c.dept_id AS deptId, c.products_name AS productsName, c.long_flg AS longFlg, c.quality_standard AS qualityStandard, c.attach_delivery_time AS attachDeliveryTime, c.extra_term AS extraTerm, c.credit_flg AS creditFlg, c.on_line_flg AS onLineFlg, c.business_type AS businessType, c.business_kind AS businessKind, c.confirm_receive_number AS confirmReceiveNumber, c.confirm_receipt_flg AS confirmReceiptFlg, c.picc_push_flg AS piccPushFlg, c.refund_amount AS refundAmount, c.adjust_flg AS adjustFlg, c.picc_remain_credit AS piccRemainCredit, c.apply_cancel_flg AS applyCancelFlg, c.match_credit_flg AS matchCreditFlg, c.pair_code AS pairCode, c.buy_content_file_id AS buyContentFileId, c.seal_flg AS sealFlg, c.seal_date AS sealDate, c.service_amount AS serviceAmount, c.receive_service_amount AS receiveServiceAmount, c.service_billed_amount AS serviceBilledAmount, c.dealed_flg AS dealedFlg, c.interest_deal_flg AS interestDealFlg, c.bill_flg AS billedFlg, c.interest_billed_flg AS interestBilledFlg, c.breach_days AS breachDays, c.credit_cycle AS creditCycle, c.picc_total_amount AS piccTotalAmount, c.deal_price AS dealPrice, c.deal_amount_no_tax AS dealAmountNoTax, c.loss_amount AS lossAmount, c.loss_number AS lossNumber, c.loss_amount_by_logistics AS lossAmountByLogistics, c.loss_amount_by_actual AS lossAmountByActual, c.loss_amount_by_supplier AS lossAmountBySupplier, c.loss_amount_by_our AS lossAmountByOur, c.premium AS premium, c.business_type_dcsx AS businessTypeDcsx, c.contract_model AS contractModel, c.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, c.carrier AS carrier, c.customer_order_code AS customerOrderCode, c.biddin_status AS biddinStatus, c.sell_interest_amount AS sellInterestAmount, c.apply_source AS applySource, c.created_date AS createdDate, c.updated_date AS updatedDate, c.confirm_date AS confirmDate, c.virtual_id AS virtualId, c.virtual_type AS virtualType, c.virtual_contract_id AS virtualContractId, c.virtual_contract_no AS virtualContractNo, c.discount_charge_target AS discountChargeTarget, c.discount_charge_amount AS discountChargeAmount, c.discount_receive_amount AS discountReceiveAmount, IF(t.id > 0 , true, false) AS existContractText, (c.total_amount - c.dealed_amount) AS receivablePrincipal, IF(c.total_amount < c.dealed_amount, 0, (c.total_amount+c.breach_amount-c.dealed_amount-c.receive_breach_amount)) AS receivableBalance, c.insurance_rate AS insuranceRate, c.insurance_amount AS insuranceAmount, c.shipping_file_id AS shippingFileId FROM t_ctr_contract c left join t_ctr_contract_text t on c.id = t.ctr_contract_id
AND c.fund_view_flag = true
AND c.enterprise_id = #{searchParams.EQL_enterpriseId}
AND c.business_type = #{searchParams.EQS_businessType}
AND c.match_credit_flg = true
AND c.match_credit_flg = false
AND c.contract_type = #{searchParams.EQS_contractType}
AND (c.contract_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_contractNo_OR_LIKES_virtualContractNo},'%') OR c.virtual_contract_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_contractNo_OR_LIKES_virtualContractNo},'%'))
AND c.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_companyName},'%')
AND c.products_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_productsName},'%')
AND c.our_company_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_ourCompanyName},'%')
AND c.pay_full_time >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.GTED_payFullTime}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AND c.pay_full_time <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.LTD_payFullTime}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
AND c.delivery_date_to >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.GTED_deliveryDateTo}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AND c.delivery_date_to <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.LTD_deliveryDateTo}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
AND c.contract_time >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.GTED_contractTime}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AND c.contract_time <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.LTD_contractTime}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
AND c.confirm_date >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.GTED_confirmDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AND c.seal_date >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.GTED_sealDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AND c.seal_date <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.LTD_sealDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
AND c.confirm_date <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.LTD_confirmDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
AND EXISTS (SELECT r.contract_id FROM t_apply_confirm_receipt r WHERE r.contract_id = c.id AND r.`status` = 'D'
AND r.updated_date >= DATE_FORMAT(#{confirmFileDateBegin}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AND r.updated_date <= DATE_FORMAT(#{confirmFileDateEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
)
AND c.dealed_amount >= c.total_amount
AND c.dealed_amount < c.total_amount
AND c.warehouse_number >= c.total_number
AND c.warehouse_number < c.total_number
AND c.billed_amount >= c.total_amount
AND c.billed_amount < c.total_amount
AND c.credit_cycle >= #{searchParams.GTEL_creditCycle}
AND c.credit_cycle < #{searchParams.LTL_creditCycle}
AND c.contract_status != 'C'
AND c.contract_status = 'C'
AND c.performance_status = #{searchParams.EQS_performanceStatus}
AND c.match_user_id = #{searchParams.EQS_matchUserId}
AND c.delivery_mode = #{searchParams.EQS_deliveryMode}
AND DATE_FORMAT(c.pay_full_time, '%Y-%m-%d') != DATE_FORMAT(c.appoint_pay_full_time, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND c.our_company_name in
#{companyNameList[${index}]}
AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT m.id FROM t_apply_match m WHERE m.approve_id = c.approve_id AND (m.buy_our_company_name in
#{companyNameList[${index}]} OR m.sell_our_company_name in
#{companyNameList[${index}]} OR m.our_company_name in
#{companyNameList[${index}]} ) ))
AND EXISTS (SELECT h.id FROM t_pm_approve_history h WHERE h.approve_id = c.approve_id AND h.approve_user_id = #{userId})
ORDER BY c.pair_code DESC, c.id ASC
ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT c.id AS id, c.approve_id AS approveId, c.enterprise_id AS enterpriseId, c.contract_type AS contractType, c.business_no AS businessNo, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.contract_time AS contractTime, c.company_id AS companyId, c.company_name AS companyName, c.our_company_name AS ourCompanyName, c.delivery_type AS deliveryType, c.pay_type AS payType, c.total_number AS totalNumber, c.delivery_mode AS deliveryMode, c.delivery_addr AS deliveryAddr, c.product_status AS productStatus, c.contract_status AS contractStatus, c.remark AS remark, c.bond_rate AS bondRate, c.bond_amount AS bondAmount, c.`status` AS STATUS, c.pay_full_time AS payFullTime, c.appoint_pay_full_time AS appointPayFullTime, c.real_pay_full_time AS realPayFullTime, c.match_user_id AS matchUserId, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.delivery_date_from AS deliveryDateFrom, c.delivery_date_to AS deliveryDateTo, c.contact_name AS contactName, c.contact_addr AS contactAddr, c.bill_flg AS billFlg, c.fond_flg AS fondFlg, c.transport_amount AS transportAmount, c.warehouse_amount AS warehouseAmount, c.real_transport_amount AS realTransportAmount, c.real_warehouse_amount AS realWarehouseAmount, c.interest_amount AS interestAmount, c.receive_interest_amount AS receiveInterestAmount, c.breach_amount AS breachAmount, c.receive_breach_amount AS receiveBreachAmount, c.warehouse_flg AS warehouseFlg, c.billed_amount AS billedAmount, c.dealed_amount AS dealedAmount, c.warehouse_number AS warehouseNumber, c.source AS source, c.link_contract_id AS linkContractId, c.dept_id AS deptId, c.products_name AS productsName, c.long_flg AS longFlg, c.quality_standard AS qualityStandard, c.attach_delivery_time AS attachDeliveryTime, c.extra_term AS extraTerm, c.credit_flg AS creditFlg, c.on_line_flg AS onLineFlg, c.business_type AS businessType, c.business_kind AS businessKind, c.confirm_receive_number AS confirmReceiveNumber, c.confirm_receipt_flg AS confirmReceiptFlg, c.picc_push_flg AS piccPushFlg, c.refund_amount AS refundAmount, c.adjust_flg AS adjustFlg, c.picc_remain_credit AS piccRemainCredit, c.apply_cancel_flg AS applyCancelFlg, c.match_credit_flg AS matchCreditFlg, c.pair_code AS pairCode, c.buy_content_file_id AS buyContentFileId, c.seal_flg AS sealFlg, c.seal_date AS sealDate, c.service_amount AS serviceAmount, c.receive_service_amount AS receiveServiceAmount, c.service_billed_amount AS serviceBilledAmount, c.dealed_flg AS dealedFlg, c.interest_deal_flg AS interestDealFlg, c.bill_flg AS billedFlg, c.interest_billed_flg AS interestBilledFlg, c.breach_days AS breachDays, c.credit_cycle AS creditCycle, c.picc_total_amount AS piccTotalAmount, c.deal_price AS dealPrice, c.deal_amount_no_tax AS dealAmountNoTax, c.loss_amount AS lossAmount, c.loss_number AS lossNumber, c.loss_amount_by_logistics AS lossAmountByLogistics, c.loss_amount_by_actual AS lossAmountByActual, c.loss_amount_by_supplier AS lossAmountBySupplier, c.loss_amount_by_our AS lossAmountByOur, c.premium AS premium, c.business_type_dcsx AS businessTypeDcsx, c.contract_model AS contractModel, c.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, c.carrier AS carrier, c.customer_order_code AS customerOrderCode, c.biddin_status AS biddinStatus, c.sell_interest_amount AS sellInterestAmount, c.apply_source AS applySource, c.created_date AS createdDate, c.updated_date AS updatedDate, c.confirm_date AS confirmDate, IF(t.id > 0 , true, false) AS existContractText, IF(c.total_amount < c.dealed_amount, 0, (c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount)) AS receivableBalance, c.insurance_rate AS insuranceRate, c.insurance_amount AS insuranceAmount, c.shipping_file_id AS shippingFileId FROM t_ctr_contract c left join t_ctr_contract_text t on c.id = t.ctr_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract buy ON c.approve_id = buy.approve_id AND buy.contract_type = 'B' LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract sell ON c.approve_id = sell.approve_id AND sell.contract_type = 'S'
and buy.dealed_amount >= buy.total_amount and sell.seal_flg = true
AND c.enterprise_id = #{searchParams.EQL_enterpriseId}
AND c.business_type = #{searchParams.EQS_businessType}
AND c.match_credit_flg = true
AND c.match_credit_flg = false
AND c.contract_type = #{searchParams.EQS_contractType}
AND c.contract_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_contractNo},'%')
AND c.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_companyName},'%')
AND c.products_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_productsName},'%')
AND c.our_company_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_ourCompanyName},'%')
AND c.pay_full_time >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.GTED_payFullTime}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AND c.pay_full_time <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.LTD_payFullTime}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
AND c.delivery_date_to >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.GTED_deliveryDateTo}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AND c.delivery_date_to <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.LTD_deliveryDateTo}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
AND c.contract_time >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.GTED_contractTime}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AND c.contract_time <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.LTD_contractTime}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
AND c.seal_date >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.GTED_sealDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AND c.seal_date <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.LTD_sealDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
AND c.confirm_date >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.GTED_confirmDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AND c.confirm_date <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.LTD_confirmDate}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
AND EXISTS (SELECT r.contract_id FROM t_apply_confirm_receipt r WHERE r.contract_id = c.id AND r.`status` = 'D'
AND r.updated_date >= DATE_FORMAT(#{confirmFileDateBegin}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
AND r.updated_date <= DATE_FORMAT(#{confirmFileDateEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
)
AND c.dealed_amount >= c.total_amount
AND c.dealed_amount < c.total_amount
AND c.warehouse_number >= c.total_number
AND c.warehouse_number < c.total_number
AND c.billed_amount >= c.total_amount
AND c.billed_amount < c.total_amount
AND c.credit_cycle >= #{searchParams.GTEL_creditCycle}
AND c.credit_cycle <= #{searchParams.LTL_creditCycle}
AND c.contract_status != 'C'
AND c.contract_status = 'C'
AND c.performance_status = #{searchParams.EQS_performanceStatus}
AND c.match_user_id = #{searchParams.EQS_matchUserId}
AND c.delivery_mode = #{searchParams.EQS_deliveryMode}
AND DATE_FORMAT(c.pay_full_time, '%Y-%m-%d') != DATE_FORMAT(c.appoint_pay_full_time, '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY c.pair_code DESC, c.id ASC
ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT SUM(c.total_number) AS totalNubmer, SUM(c.warehouse_number) AS warehouseNumber, SUM(c.total_amount) AS totalAmount, SUM(c.dealed_amount) AS dealedAmount, SUM(c.billed_amount) AS billedAmount, SUM(c.warehouse_amount) AS warehouseAmount, SUM(c.transport_amount) AS transportAmount, SUM(c.stevedorage) AS stevedorage, SUM(c.breach_amount) AS breachAmount, SUM(c.receive_breach_amount) AS receiveBreachAmount, SUM(c.insurance_amount) AS interestAmount, SUM(IF(c.total_amount < c.dealed_amount, 0, (c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount))) AS receivableBalance FROM t_ctr_contract c
AND c.fund_view_flag = true
AND c.enterprise_id = #{searchParams.EQL_enterpriseId}
AND c.business_type = #{searchParams.EQS_businessType}
AND c.match_credit_flg = true
AND c.match_credit_flg = false
AND c.contract_type = #{searchParams.EQS_contractType}
AND (c.contract_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_contractNo_OR_LIKES_virtualContractNo},'%') OR c.virtual_contract_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_contractNo_OR_LIKES_virtualContractNo},'%'))
AND c.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_companyName},'%')
AND c.products_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_productsName},'%')
AND c.our_company_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchParams.LIKES_ourCompanyName},'%')
AND DATE_FORMAT(c.pay_full_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.GTED_payFullTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(c.pay_full_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.LTD_payFullTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(c.delivery_date_to, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.GTED_deliveryDateTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(c.delivery_date_to, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.LTD_deliveryDateTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(c.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.GTED_contractTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(c.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchParams.LTD_contractTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND c.dealed_amount >= c.total_amount
AND c.dealed_amount < c.total_amount
AND c.warehouse_number >= c.total_number
AND c.warehouse_number < c.total_number
AND c.billed_amount >= c.total_amount
AND c.billed_amount < c.total_amount
AND c.credit_cycle >= #{searchParams.GTEL_creditCycle}
AND c.credit_cycle < #{searchParams.LTL_creditCycle}
AND c.contract_status != 'C'
AND c.contract_status = 'C'
AND c.performance_status = #{searchParams.EQS_performanceStatus}
AND c.match_user_id = #{searchParams.EQS_matchUserId}
AND c.delivery_mode = #{searchParams.EQS_deliveryMode}
AND DATE_FORMAT(c.pay_full_time, '%Y-%m-%d') != DATE_FORMAT(c.appoint_pay_full_time, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND c.our_company_name in
#{companyNameList[${index}]}
AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT m.id FROM t_apply_match m WHERE m.approve_id = c.approve_id AND (m.buy_our_company_name in
#{companyNameList[${index}]} OR m.sell_our_company_name in
#{companyNameList[${index}]} OR m.our_company_name in
#{companyNameList[${index}]} ) ))
AND EXISTS (SELECT h.id FROM t_pm_approve_history h WHERE h.approve_id = c.approve_id AND h.approve_user_id = #{userId})

SELECT c.id AS contractId, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.approve_id AS approveId, c.business_type_dcsx AS businessTypeDcsx, c.products_name AS productNames, c.company_id AS companyId, c.company_name AS companyName, c.our_company_name AS ourCompanyName, IFNULL(b.picc_credit_amount, 0) AS piccCreditAmount, c.total_number AS totalNumber, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.dealed_amount AS receiveAmount, IF( c.dealed_amount > c.total_amount, c.total_amount, c.total_amount - c.dealed_amount ) AS receivableAmount, c.match_user_id AS matchUserId, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.dept_id AS deptId, c.appoint_pay_full_time AS appointPayFullTime, IF( c.confirm_receive_number > c.total_number, c.total_number, c.confirm_receive_number ) AS confirmReceiptNumber, c.confirm_date AS confirmDate, c.credit_cycle AS creditCycle, c.breach_days AS breachDays, c.breach_amount AS breachAmount, c.performance_status AS performanceStatus, c.latest_bill_date AS latestBillDate, (SELECT f.notify_content FROM t_ctr_contract_follow f WHERE f.ctr_contract_id = c.id ORDER BY f.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS notifyContent, d.company_name AS fundCompanyName, case when COALESCE(c.billed_amount,0) >= c.total_amount+COALESCE(c.interest_amount,0) then '已开票' when COALESCE(c.billed_amount,0) < c.total_amount+COALESCE(c.interest_amount,0) then '未开票' else '未开票' end as 'invoiceBillName' FROM t_ctr_contract c LEFT JOIN t_bs_company b ON c.company_id = b.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_dcsx d on d.approve_id = c.approve_id AND d.business_type = 'ZY-BB' WHERE c.contract_type = 'S' AND c.match_credit_flg = TRUE AND c.breach_days > 0 AND c.contract_status != 'D' AND c.contract_status != 'C'
ORDER BY c.breach_days DESC

SELECT SUM(IF( c.dealed_amount > c.total_amount, c.total_amount, c.total_amount - c.dealed_amount )) AS receivableAmount, SUM(c.breach_amount) AS breachAmount FROM t_ctr_contract c LEFT JOIN t_bs_company b ON c.company_id = b.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_dcsx d on d.approve_id = c.approve_id AND d.business_type = 'ZY-BB' WHERE c.contract_type = 'S' AND c.match_credit_flg = TRUE AND c.breach_days > 0 AND c.contract_status != 'D' AND c.contract_status != 'C'
